partnerx.ecoLead: Over decades KESSEL has built the infrastructure of a premium brand — K-Aqua brings the same attitude to water supply.

eco.d: KESSEL shows presence at the world’s leading trade fair of the building-services industry — the stage where drainage and supply are thought of together.
The digital platform for specifiers is the heart of daily planner engagement — the model for K-Aqua’s digital tools.
Physical and hybrid training at dedicated locations, including Lenting and Hamburg — knowledge transfer builds loyalty.
KESSEL’s editorially maintained planning knowledge is the reference for how K-Aqua expands its knowledge area for specifiers — from the Academy to the dimension tables.

partnerx.flowLead: Every building needs both directions — the partnership covers the complete water path with a shared engineering DNA.

flow.d: Drinking water supply d20–d630: pipes, fittings, valves and welding technology, made in Waldsolms.
The premium manufacturer of drainage technology: backwater protection, lifting stations, separators — the authority of the industry.
Specifiers and installers work with one community of values: the same quality philosophy, coordinated support, short paths.

road.d: Four welding methods as video documentation plus a quiz — available today, optimised for the site.
Devices, tools and instruction for your crew — direct from the manufacturer.
Product Finder, CO₂ calculator and Trust Center as self-service — expanding along the PlanerPortal model.
The perspective: configure pipe networks parametrically and hand them straight into parts list and enquiry.

partnerx.specLead: Product specification is decided inside tendering and CAD software — that is where we deliver.

spec.d: Ready-made texts for your bill of quantities — part of the RFP package in the Trust Center.
Planning data for model-based work — on request via sales, expansion ongoing.
Product catalogue and features as PDF, samples and project consulting straight from the plant.
